dd2579DocumentPath.description: Storage bucket file path or file-name suffix for the single DD2579 document used as the primary 3-way match input.

sf1449DocumentPath1.description: Storage bucket file path or file-name suffix for the first SF1449 document to process.

sf1449DocumentPath2.description: Storage bucket file path or file-name suffix for the second SF1449 document to process.

saadDocumentPath.description: Optional SAAD storage bucket file path or file-name suffix. Leave blank to skip SAAD processing.

dftrDocumentPath.description: Optional DF TR storage bucket file path or file-name suffix. Leave blank to skip DF TR processing.

content.description: Strict JSON findings returned by the Contract Validation Agent.

excelReportRowsJson.description: Excel-ready findings rows as JSON for downstream reporting.

bucketFilePath.description: Storage bucket path for the generated Excel workbook.

sharePointUploadStatus.description: SharePoint upload status and destination for the generated Excel workbook.

localWorkbookPath.description: Robot-local workbook path returned by the export workflow.
